cities.name: Amsterdam
cities.notes: Canals by bike, Rijksmuseum, Van Gogh Museum and Anne Frank House

cities.name: Rotterdam
cities.notes: Cube houses, Erasmus Bridge, Markthal food hall and Fenix warehouse

cities.name: Delft
cities.notes: Blue and white Delftware pottery, Vermeer birthplace and canal walks

cities.name: Utrecht
cities.notes: Dom Tower views, wharf-level cafe terraces along the Oudegracht

cities.name: Haarlem
cities.notes: Medieval Grote Kerk, tulip bulb fields nearby and Frans Hals Museum
